name: Rendon Ceratops
visual_description: A stocky ceratopsian dinosaur with a broad bony frill and thick horns charges forward, muscles tensed for impact. Dusty brown and slate-grey scales cover its powerful frame. Behind it, the towering stone walls of a medieval city recede, dwarfed by the creature's sheer mass and presence.
full_prompt: A stocky ceratopsian dinosaur with a broad bony frill and thick horns charges forward, muscles tensed for impact. Dusty brown and slate-grey scales cover its powerful frame. Behind it, the towering stone walls of a medieval city recede, dwarfed by the creature's sheer mass and presence.. Stylized digital illustration, wide naturalist composition, rich earth tones with dappled light, layered depth, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
